title: ctenopteris subfalcata
intro: Ctenopteris subfalcata, also known as the New Zealand fern, is a type of plant native to the region, characterized by its distinctive fronds and ability to thrive in shaded areas. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. In terms of health benefits, ctenopteris subfalcata has been traditionally used to aid in digestion and reduce fever, as well as to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to create teas and topical treatments for various health issues.
